sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: MPC Q4/FY2025: 4분기 순이익 15억 달러로 전년比 급증, 연간 자본환원 45억 달러 집행

keyPoints.text: 4분기 순이익(MPC 귀속분) 15억 달러(희석 EPS 5.12달러), 조정 순이익 12억 달러(EPS 4.07달러)를 기록했다. 전년 동기 조정 순이익 2억 4,900만 달러 대비 크게 개선됐다.
2025년 연간 영업현금흐름 83억 달러를 창출해 자사주 매입·배당 등 자본환원 45억 달러를 집행했다. 전체 정제 가동률 94%, 마진 capture율 105%로 우수한 운영·상업 성과를 달성했다.

businessChanges.text: MPLX가 Natural Gas·NGL 가치 사슬 전반에 걸쳐 확장을 추진하고 있으며, 증가하는 MPLX 배분이 MPC의 2026년 배당 및 자체 자본지출을 초과 커버할 것으로 기대돼 자본환원 차별화 요인으로 작용하고 있다.

financialHighlights.text: 4분기 조정 EBITDA 35억 달러로 전년 동기 21억 달러 대비 크게 개선됐다.
4분기 R&M 세그먼트 조정 EBITDA 19억 9,700만 달러로, 배럴당 7.15달러(전년 동기 배럴당 2.03달러)로 급등했다.
2025년 연간 GAAP 순이익 40억 달러(희석 EPS 13.22달러), 연간 조정 EBITDA 120억 달러를 기록했다.

watchItems.text: 2026년 MPLX 배분 성장이 MPC 배당 및 자체 자본지출을 실제로 초과 커버하는지, 그리고 크랙 스프레드 정상화 시 R&M 마진이 얼마나 방어되는지가 핵심 모니터링 포인트다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 mpcq42025earningsrelease.htm EX-99.1 Document Exhibit 99.1 Marathon Petroleum Corp. Reports Fourth-Quarter and Full-Year 2025 Results • Fourth-quarter net income attributable to MPC of $1.5 billion, or $5.12 per diluted share, adjusted net income of $1.2 billion, or $4.07 per diluted share • Full-year refining utilization of 94 percent and margin capture of 105 percent, demonstrating strong operational and commercial performance • Cash from operations of $8.3 billion enabled peer-leading capital returns of $4.5 billion in 2025 • MPLX’s growing distribution is expected to more than fund MPC’s 2026 dividend and standalone capital; a source of differentiation for capital return FINDLAY, Ohio, Feb. 3, 2026 – Marathon Petroleum Corp.  Normalized numeric aliases: $1.5 billion = 15억 달러; $1.2 billion = 12억 달러; $8.3 billion = 83억 달러; $4.5 billion = 45억 달러; $1.5 = 1.5달러; $5.12 = 5.12달러; $1.2 = 1.2달러; $4.07 = 4.07달러; $4.5 = 4.5달러; $8.3 = 8.3달러; 94 percent = 94%; 105 percent = 105%.

income attributable to MPC of $371 million, or $1.15 per diluted share, for the fourth quarter of 2024. Adjusted net income was $1.2 billion, or $4.07 per diluted share, for the fourth quarter of 2025. This compares to adjusted net income of $249 million, or $0.77 per diluted share, for the fourth quarter of 2024. The fourth quarter of 2025 adjusted earnings before interest, taxes, depreciation, and amortization (adjusted EBITDA) was $3.5 billion, compared with $2.1 billion for the fourth quarter of 2024. For the full year 2025, net income attributable to MPC was $4.0 billion, or $13.22 per diluted share, compared with net income  Normalized numeric aliases: $371 million = 3억 7,100만 달러; $1.2 billion = 12억 달러; $249 million = 2억 4,900만 달러; $3.5 billion = 35억 달러; $2.1 billion = 21억 달러; $4.0 billion = 40억 달러; $3.4 billion = 34억 달러; $3.3 billion = 33억 달러; $1.15 = 1.15달러; $3.5 = 3.5달러; $10.08 = 10.08달러; $13.22 = 13.22달러; $3.4 = 3.4달러; $3.3 = 3.3달러; $10.70 = 10.70달러; $9.51 = 9.51달러.

for the full year 2024. Cash provided by operating activities was $8.3 billion for the full year 2025, compared with $8.7 billion for the full year 2024. Adjusted EBITDA was $12.0 billion for the full year 2025, compared with $11.3 billion for the full year 2024. “In 2025, strong refining operational performance and commercial execution drove cash flow generation,” said Chairman, President and Chief Executive Officer Maryann Mannen. “The deployment of MPC capital enhances our competitiveness in each of the regions where we operate. In Midstream, MPLX is investing to execute its natural gas and NGL growth strategies. Growing MPLX distributions differentiates MPC from peers and supports our commitment to industry-leading capital return.” 1 Results from Operations Adjusted EBITDA (unaudited) Three Months  Normalized numeric aliases: $8.3 billion = 83억 달러; $8.7 billion = 87억 달러; $12.0 billion = 120억 달러; $11.3 billion = 113억 달러; $8.3 = 8.3달러; $8.7 = 8.7달러; $12.0 = 12.0달러; $11.3 = 11.3달러.
